insight: When chat messages don't appear in console, check the channel's per-channel `Format_Console` key in settings.yml under Channels.List. Setting it to `none` suppresses console output by design (handled in Channel.java and both chat listeners). The global default is `[{channel}] {player}: {message}`. There is no global "log to console" boolean — `Format_Console` per channel is the only console toggle.
